spec_match.rationale: Generates the eight EXIF orientation cases from four stored rotations plus the boolean horizontal flip flag, constructs real VideoFrames, and reads back rotation, flip, coded dimensions, and display dimensions.

interactive.rationale: Generate and Clear controls were exercised with DevTools MCP; all eight cards regenerate live after clearing.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page promises an EXIF/HEIF gallery with live VideoFrame metadata. The verified cards include EXIF labels, rotation/flip readback, coded/display dimensions, and render path.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers every EXIF orientation mapping and links to the rotation rounding probe for arbitrary numeric rotation parsing.

references.rationale: See-also includes ChromeStatus feature 5128855343595520, the WebCodecs spec, and sibling orientation demos.

design_system.rationale: The support badge now uses CSS classes and design-system variables instead of inline raw hex colors; raw color values remain confined to bitmap pixels.

summary: Verified in Chrome 148 with chrome-devtools-mcp: support badge reported VideoFrame orientation support, all eight EXIF cards rendered with coded/display metadata, Clear emptied the gallery, Generate restored it, and console stayed clean.
